text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well? How's my smile? They say fortune 
comes to the most joyous!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now it's your turn! That's it, raise your 
hands and…

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Tickle, tickle, tickle! Laughter will bring you even more luck!♪
